sys_app.name: SearchPulse
sys_app.short_description: Agentic search trust system. Captures user signals, computes article reputation, displays AI Summary Confidence and Trust Badges.

sys_user_role.description: Full admin access to SearchPulse tables, jobs, and dashboards.
sys_user_role.name: x_searchpulse.admin

sys_user_role.description: Read-only access to SearchPulse analytics and reputation records.
sys_user_role.name: x_searchpulse.analyst

sys_script_include.description: Captures search signals from UI scripts via GlideAjax. Signals: summary_up, summary_down, scroll, click, return, reformulate. Updates x_searchpulse_session fields.
sys_script_include.name: SearchPulseSignalAPI

sys_script_include.description: Classifies search sessions into outcomes A-F. A=Summary Satisfied, B=Ambiguous, C=Drilled Down Success, D=Result Failed, E=Full Search Failure, F=Summary Rejected.
sys_script_include.name: SearchPulseSessionClassifier

sys_script_include.description: Calculates AI Summary Confidence Score by averaging reputation of cited articles. High=score>=70 (green), Medium=45-69 (amber), Low=below 45 (red).
sys_script_include.name: SearchPulseConfidence

sys_script_include.description: Assigns trust badges to KB articles. Frequently Helpful (rep>=75, green), Updated Recently (updated within 30d AND rep>=50, blue), May Be Outdated (rep less than 50 AND updated more than 180d ago, amber).
sys_script_include.name: SearchPulseBadgeEngine

sys_trigger.name: SearchPulse Reputation Calculator

sys_ui_script.description: Captures user search signals from the Service Portal / AI Search page. Uses GlideAjax to call SearchPulseSignalAPI. Public API: summaryFeedback(type), scrollDetection(), resultClicked(article), detectReformulation().
sys_ui_script.name: SearchPulseTracker

sp_widget.description: AI Summary Confidence Indicator widget. Shows High (green, score 70-100), Medium (amber, 45-69), or Low (red, 0-44) confidence based on average article reputation of cited sources.
sp_widget.name: SearchPulse Confidence Indicator
sp_widget.template:
AI Summary Confidence
{{c.conf.label}} Confidence
Score: {{c.conf.score}} / 100 — {{c.conf.description}}

sp_widget.description: Full search results widget with AI Summary panel, Confidence badge, Trust Badges per article (Frequently Helpful, Updated Recently, May Be Outdated), and thumbs feedback. Integrates with SearchPulseTracker UI Script.
sp_widget.name: SearchPulse Trust Badge Display
sp_widget.template:
AI Summary {{c.confidence.label}} Confidence ({{c.confidence.score}}/100)
Based on your search for "{{c.query}}", {{c.results.length}} article(s) were found. AI analysis confidence is {{c.confidence.label}} based on community trust signals.
Was this summary helpful? Thanks for your feedback!
{{data.results.length}} result(s) found
  • {{result.badge.badge}}

    {{result.category}}   {{result.updated}}

No results found for "{{c.query}}"

sys_hub_flow.description: Triggered when an article reputation score drops below 40. Creates a task for the Knowledge Owner, notifies the content owner, and logs a suggestion to update the article.
sys_hub_flow.label: SearchPulse Content Quality Monitor
sys_hub_flow.name: SearchPulse Content Quality Monitor

sys_script.description: SearchPulse Content Quality Monitor: when reputation_score drops below 40, create a knowledge task for the article owner and send an email notification.
sys_script.name: SearchPulse Content Quality Monitor

pa_dashboard.description: SearchPulse Insights - tracks article reputation trends, search failure rates, and content quality signals.
pa_dashboard.name: SearchPulse Insights

pa_widget_instance.sys_name: SearchPulse Insights - Thumbs Down Rate Widget

sys_update_set.description: SearchPulse Agent POC - Complete update set containing all tables, script includes, scheduled job, UI script, Service Portal widgets, flow automation, and analytics dashboard for the SearchPulse agentic search trust system.
sys_update_set.name: SearchPulse_Agent_POC
